offer: For medical clinic administrators processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of patient billing and insurance payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinic administrators
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM 20-50 medical clinic administrators with a demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users manually enter patient billing and insurance payment data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
